name: Heirloom Tomatoes (1 lb)
description: A colourful mix of vine-ripened heirloom tomatoes in red, yellow, and purple varieties. Bursting with complex, sweet-tangy flavour that modern hybrid tomatoes simply can't match. Grown using sustainable farming practices.

specifications.value: Brandywine, Cherokee Purple, Green Zebra, Yellow Pear
4–6 days at room temperature; up to 10 days refrigerated
Room temperature for best flavour; refrigerate to extend life

reviews.title: Tomatoes that actually taste like tomatoes
reviews.reviewText: I had forgotten what a real tomato tastes like until I tried these. Incredible depth of flavour. The purple Cherokees are my absolute favourite. A must-buy!

reviews.title: Made the best bruschetta of my life
reviews.reviewText: Picked up these heirlooms for a dinner party bruschetta and got more compliments on the tomatoes than on my cooking skills. The variety mix is beautiful.

reviews.title: Beautiful and delicious
reviews.reviewText: The colours and flavours are stunning. One of the green zebras was slightly under-ripe, but everything else was perfect. Great value for heirlooms.

reviews.title: Superb quality
reviews.reviewText: These arrived carefully packed and every tomato was in perfect condition. The flavour is rich and complex. Won't go back to supermarket tomatoes.

reviews.title: Great for caprese
reviews.reviewText: Sliced these with fresh mozzarella and basil - absolute perfection. Slightly pricier than regular tomatoes but well worth it for a special meal.
